name: Extraordinary Ball
short_description: Dive into an unforgettable adventure with an ordinary office clerk who suddenly finds himself trapped in a magical world!
detailed_description:
Dive into an unforgettable adventure with an ordinary office clerk who suddenly finds himself trapped in a magical world!
In Extraordinary Ball, the classic pong genre gets a bold new twist: you're not just bouncing a ball — you're battling a variety of unique enemies across diverse locations, from sunlit beaches and mysterious forests to grim death fields and the enigmatic Red World.

Your mission? Score goals while defending your side, using not only your hero but also his special throwing daggers, which allow you to strike the ball with incredible power and precision. Face off against mighty bosses, each equipped with magical items that enhance their defenses and bring even greater challenges to every encounter.

Extraordinary Ball is a fast-paced fusion of classic pong and fantasy action, packed with dynamic arenas and creative mechanics.
Are you ready to conquer every challenge and guide the hero back to the real world?
Then step into the game — your adventure awaits!

Game Features:

  • Fantasy Twist on Classic Pong

  • Dynamic Arenas

  • Special Throwing Daggers
